title: aeschynanthus elmeri
intro: Aeschynanthus elmeri, also known as the Elmer's Lipstick Plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. Aeschynanthus elmeri can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed as a tea or added to herbal remedies.
